signals.headline: Germany's Inflation Climbs to 2
signals.raw:
Germany's Inflation Climbs to 2.7% in March, Highest Since January 2024 | YES | HIGH confidence**

Germany's annual inflation rate **accelerated to 2.7% in March 2026**, up from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates[1]. signals.headline: South Korea GDP Growth Projected at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea GDP Growth Projected at 2.2% for 2026 | YES | MED confidence**

According to OECD projections, South Korea's GDP growth is expected to weaken to 1.0% in 2025 before picking up to 2.2% in 2026[4]. signals.headline: South Korea Inflation to Remain Near Target | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
South Korea Inflation to Remain Near Target | YES | MED confidence**

The OECD forecasts that inflation in South Korea will remain close to its target level, with the Bank of Korea having cut its policy rate to 2.75% in February and expected to lower it further to 2.0% in 2025 amid weak demand[4].
